text:
Le ven  3 sep 10 à 17:55:31 +0200, Thierry Thomas <thierry@FreeBSD.org>
 écrivait :
 
> If you are interested, I wrote a port for tt-rss some time ago, and it
> includes a rc.d script to update the feeds. Check the attachment, and
> see if you can use it...

Hmmm... It seems that GNATS eats the attachments! Once again, as
inlined:

X#! /bin/sh
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
X# PROVIDE: ttrssd
X# REQUIRE: LOGIN mysql postgresql
X# KEYWORD: shutdown
X
X# Add the following line to /etc/rc.conf to enable `ttrssd':
X#
X#ttrssd_enable="YES"
X#
X
X. /etc/rc.subr
X
Xname="ttrssd"
Xrcvar=`set_rcvar`
X
X# read settings, set default values
Xload_rc_config "${name}"
X: ${ttrssd_enable="NO"}
X
Xrequired_files="%%WWWDIR%%/config.php"
Xpidfile="/var/run/${name}.pid"
Xphpcli="%%LOCALBASE%%/bin/php"
Xcommand_interpreter=$phpcli
Xlong_name="Tiny Tiny RSS updating feeds daemon."
Xphpupd="update_daemon2.php"
Xttrssd_log="/var/log/${name}.log"
X
Xstart_cmd=${name}_start
Xstop_cmd=${name}_stop
X
Xttrssd_start() {
X	[ -x $phpcli ] || (echo "$phpcli not found"; exit 1)
X	[ -f $pidfile ] && (echo "$name already running?"; exit 2)
X	echo "Starting $long_name"
X	(cd %%WWWDIR%% && ./$phpupd > $ttrssd_log &) && \
X	echo $$ > $pidfile
X}
X
Xttrssd_stop() {
X	[ -f $pidfile ] || (echo "$name not running?"; exit 1)
X	echo "Stopping $long_name"
X	kill `ps | grep $phpupd | grep -v grep | awk '{print $1}'`
X	rm -f $pidfile
X}
X
Xrun_rc_command "$1"

X===============================================================================
XTiny Tiny RSS is now installed, but it requires some additional setup.
X
XYou now need to create the DB used by Tiny Tiny RSS as its back-end:
Xcreate a database and a user, and source the script
X%%WWWDIR%%/schema/ttrss_schema_%%DB%%.sql .
X
XThen, you need to edit the configuration file
X%%WWWDIR%%/config.php
X
XYou also need to add appropriate configuration directives to your apache
Xconfiguration file (%%PREFIX%%/etc/apache(2)/httpd.conf).
X
XE.g., you could copy %%DATADIR%%/httpd-tt-rss.conf
Xto %%LOCALBASE%%/etc/apache22/Includes/ if using apache22.
X
XThen, you should be able to check <http://localhost/tt-rss/> and
X<http://localhost/tt-rss/mobile/> with a browser.
X(the first time, the user is "admin", with the password "password")
X
XAnd to update your feeds, you have to enable the daemon ttrssd in
X/etc/rc.conf and start %%PREFIX%%/etc/rc.d/ttrssd . You may also add an entry
Xfor /var/log/ttrssd.log in your /etc/newsyslog.conf .
X
XPlease read <http://tt-rss.org/redmine/wiki/tt-rss/InstallationNotes> and
X<http://tt-rss.org/redmine/wiki/tt-rss/UpdatingFeeds> for important points.
X===============================================================================

X# New ports collection makefile for:	tt-rss
X# Date created:		18 August 2010
X# Whom:			Thierry Thomas <thierry@pompo.net>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	tt-rss
XPORTVERSION=	1.4.2
XCATEGORIES=	www
XMASTER_SITES=	http://tt-rss.org/download/
X
XMAINTAINER=	thierry@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=	Tiny Tiny RSS: web-based news feed (RSS/Atom) aggregator
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
X
XUSE_PHP=	mbstring pcntl session xmlrpc
XWANT_PHP_WEB=	yes
XWANT_PHP_CLI=	yes
XREINPLACE_ARGS=	-i ""
X
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	ttrssd
X
X.if defined(WITH_PGSQL)
XUSE_PHP+=	pgsql
XDB=		pgsql
X.else
XUSE_PHP+=	mysql
XDB=		mysql
X.endif
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_CURL)
XUSE_PHP+=	curl
X.endif
X
XLICENSE=	GPLv2
X
XSUB_FILES=	httpd-tt-rss.conf pkg-message
XSUB_LIST=	DB=${DB}
XPLIST_SUB=	WWWOWN=${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP}
XPKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
X
XPHP2FIX=	config.php-dist update_daemon.php update_daemon2.php		\
X		update_daemon_loop.php update_feedbrowser.php update_feeds.php
X
XSCRIPTS=	update-translations.sh update_daemon.php update_daemon2.php	\
X		update_daemon_loop.php update_feedbrowser.php update_feeds.php
X
Xpre-everything::
X	@${ECHO_MSG}
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "	By default, Tiny Tiny RSS will use MySQL as a back-end;"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "	define WITH_PGSQL if you prefer PostgreSQL."
X	@${ECHO_MSG}
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "	CURL is required for SimplePie, but if you prefer Magpie,"
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "	you can define WITHOUT_CURL."
X	@${ECHO_MSG}
X
Xpre-configure:
X.for script in ${PHP2FIX}
X	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/bin/php|${LOCALBASE}/bin/php|'	\
X		${WRKSRC}/${script}
X.endfor
X
Xdo-configure:
X.if !defined(WITH_PGSQL)
X	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/DB_TYPE/s|pgsql|mysql|;s|mysql$$|pgsql|'	\
X		${WRKSRC}/config.php-dist
X.endif
X	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/SINGLE_USER_MODE/s|true|false|'		\
X		-e '/ENABLE_UPDATE_DAEMON/s|false|true|'		\
X		${WRKSRC}/config.php-dist
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR} ${DATADIR}
X	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${WWWDIR})
X	${RM} ${WWWDIR}/LICENSE
X	${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}
X	${CHMOD} ug+x ${SCRIPTS:S|^|${WWWDIR}/|}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/httpd-tt-rss.conf ${DATADIR}
X	if [ ! -f ${WWWDIR}/config.php ]; then \
X		${CP} -p ${WWWDIR}/config.php-dist ${WWWDIR}/config.php; \
X		${CHMOD} go-r ${WWWDIR}/config.php; \
X	fi
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${ECHO_MSG}
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X	@${ECHO_MSG}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
